text:
Created attachment 238337
Git diff update mail/clawsker version 1.3.7

Update mail/clawsker to latest version 1.3.7.

Also adding missing run dependency (sysutils/p5-File-Which) and upgrade run dependency (sysutils/p5-Gtk2 -> p5-Gtk3), which made version 1.3.5 terminat with error messages, without starting a user interface.

portlint   OK
portclippy OK

Unfortunately I have no functional poudriere system at the moment. No testport.
